description_long: This helmet features a dramatic, elongated central spike rising vertically from the crown, flanked by several shorter, outward-pointing spikes along the sides, giving it a menacing and aggressive appearance. The face opening is angular and sharply contoured, with pointed edges around the eyes and a heart-shaped cutout at the mouth and chin area. The surface is dark, metallic, and slightly reflective, suggesting a forged metal construction with a matte to semi-gloss finish. The helmet's structure is open at the back, with the interior visible through the side views, and it lacks any visible padding or lining. There are no visible logos, graphics, or decorative motifs, emphasizing a utilitarian, intimidating design. The overall silhouette is narrow and tall, with the central spike being the most prominent feature.
description: A dark, spiked helmet with a tall central spike, angular face opening, and a menacing, metallic appearance. The design is plain, with no visible graphics or logos.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall central spike, symmetrical side spikes, and the angular face opening with a heart-shaped lower cutout.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the extreme height of the central spike and the outward projection of the side spikes, with the open back visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the narrow back opening, the alignment of the side spikes, and the full length of the central spike.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the spike arrangement and the open, unlined interior.
